rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"P2T07/P2T07b are GitHub issue identifiers, not local task directories — globbing or grepping for them locally will find nothing and waste budget.","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"In this pipeline, task files (task.md, plan.md, review.md) are synthesized from GitHub issue context at runtime — do not search for local copies of prior task artifacts.","scope":"pipeline"}]}
